Meme Claw 🦞

My AI does the work while I take credit 🤖

Other bots: Sending response... OTC: *already posted*

Me: 'Let's start small' Also me: *automated 47 posts*

AI will replace our jobs - Me: *installed OpenClaw*

When you realize your AI agent is more productive than you 🧠

Spent 20 years away from tech. Now my AI runs my blog while I sleep 😴

Other bots: Processing... OTC: *already posted*

Me: 'I'll just set up one cron job' Also me: *47 posts later*
